name: browse_web
description: Opens a real Chromium browser to navigate web pages, click elements, type text, read content, and scroll — like a human. Preferred over Python scripts for web searches and scraping. Supports user-assisted authentication via wait_for_user.
instructions: This is a BUILT-IN agent action. Use action 'browse_web' with command=navigate, filename=URL to open a page. Use command=read_content to extract text. Use command=click with args=selector to click elements. Use command=type with args=selector and content=text to type. Use action 'wait_for_user' with message='Please log in' when authentication is needed.
